questionHtml:
The diagram shows a cross section through the small intestine of a mammal. Which label points to the mucosa?

[Source: JOSE LUIS CALVO MARTIN & JOSE ENRIQUE GARCIA-MAURIÑO MUZQUIZ / www.istockphoto.com.]
